tools.name: acuity_list_appointments
tools.description: List appointments scheduled on the account, with optional filters. Acuity REST: GET /appointments.

tools.name: acuity_get_appointment
tools.description: Get a single appointment by its id. Acuity REST: GET /appointments/{id}.

tools.name: acuity_list_appointment_types
tools.description: List the account's appointment types (services and classes), including price, duration and calendars. Acuity REST: GET /appointment-types.

tools.name: acuity_list_calendars
tools.description: List the account's calendars (staff/resources appointments can be booked on). Acuity REST: GET /calendars.

tools.name: acuity_availability_dates
tools.description: List dates in a month that have availability for an appointment type. Acuity REST: GET /availability/dates.

tools.name: acuity_availability_times
tools.description: List available time slots on a given date for an appointment type. Acuity REST: GET /availability/times.

tools.name: acuity_availability_classes
tools.description: List group class time slots (for class-type appointment types) in a month. Acuity REST: GET /availability/classes.

tools.name: acuity_list_clients
tools.description: List clients on the account, optionally filtered by a search string (name/email/phone). Acuity REST: GET /clients.

tools.name: acuity_list_forms
tools.description: List the account's custom intake forms and their fields. Acuity REST: GET /forms.

tools.name: acuity_list_products
tools.description: List the account's products / packages / gift certificates for sale. Acuity REST: GET /products.

tools.name: acuity_list_orders
tools.description: List store orders (product / package / gift-certificate purchases). Acuity REST: GET /orders.

tools.name: acuity_list_blocks
tools.description: List blocked-off (unavailable) time ranges on the account's calendars. Acuity REST: GET /blocks.

tools.name: acuity_list_labels
tools.description: List the appointment labels (colored tags) defined on the account. Acuity REST: GET /labels.

tools.name: acuity_get_me
tools.description: Get the authenticated Acuity account's profile (name, email, timezone, plan, currency). Acuity REST: GET /me.

tools.name: acuity_create_appointment
tools.description: CREATES a new appointment (books a client into a time slot). This MODIFIES the calendar and, unless suppressed, may send confirmation emails. Acuity REST: POST /appointments.

tools.name: acuity_cancel_appointment
tools.description: CANCELS an existing appointment. This MODIFIES the calendar and, unless suppressed, may send cancellation emails. Acuity REST: PUT /appointments/{id}/cancel.

tools.name: acuity_reschedule_appointment
tools.description: RESCHEDULES an existing appointment to a new time (and optionally a new calendar). This MODIFIES the calendar and, unless suppressed, may send update emails. Acuity REST: PUT /appointments/{id}/reschedule.

tools.name: acuity_create_client
tools.description: CREATES a new client record in the account's client list. This ADDS data to the account. Acuity REST: POST /clients.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: acuity_list_clients, acuity_get_me, acuity_create_client · Private data: acuity_create_client · Public sink: acuity_list_clients, acuity_get_me, acuity_create_appointment, acuity_cancel_appointment, acuity_reschedule_appointment, acuity_create_client.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: acuity_list_clients, acuity_get_me, acuity_create_client · Private data: acuity_create_client · Public sink: acuity_list_clients, acuity_get_me, acuity_create_appointment, acuity_cancel_appointment, acuity_reschedule_appointment, acuity_create_client

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
